race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines Mdn Hcp
race.comment: MOSCATEL (12) well bred Snitzel filly from the stakes winner Sweet Sherry on debut for the Waterhouse & Bott yard. Has shown enough in all her trials to make a winning debut from the inside gate. I AM DIRTY (10) I Am Invincible filly from Group winning mare Dirty Thoughts on debut for the Baker yard. Has looked sharp in all three trials and expected to play a leading role. BETTER OFF ALONE (6) comes here with race fitness on her side fourth-up after catching the eye with a game second over 1100m in the Wellington Boot. Can overcome the draw and go close. MISS BLACK BETTY (11) is an impeccably bred two-year-old filly on debut for the Waller yard. By Savabeel from Symphonic who has produced a winner at the elite level. Well drawn with the two trials and stays in the mix. The chances don't end there.
